description: Example conflict report for a contract with governing-law and defined-term contradictions

conflicts.description: "confidential information" has conflicting definitions across sections.

notes: Governing-law conflict: Section 12.1 cites New York law; Section 18.3 cites Delaware.
Defined-term conflict: Section 2 defines 'Confidential Information' to exclude publicly available data; Section 9 defines it more broadly to include all non-public information.
Amount conflict: Section 4 states the monthly fee is $5,000; the Schedule A attachment states $5,500.
